title: Johnsons SCABIOUS Black Knight
features: Easy to grow, tall flowers with masses of delicate pale stamen, 'sprinkled' pver the dusky petals for a wonderful contrast
description: From the brand Previous page How did we start ? Fothergill's started in 1978 in Lillie Langtry's former Newmarket home. From a small family business, it grew into a top gardening name, known for excellence, innovation, and dedication to customers. Are our products high quality? Yes, our products are high quality. We test each seed batch in our Trial Fields to ensure germination and package them in an industry-leading production facility. What makes our products unique? Our products stand out due to our extensive range of flower, vegetable, herb seeds and propagation tools.
